root.m_Talk_ENG:
They are preparing to open a cafe, but they keep smelling this awful

root.m_Talk_DEU: Der Schwimmclub hat ein Caf959 vorbereitet, aber um das Caf959 herum soll ein unerkl95trlicher Gestank in der Luft liegen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's an oil barrel near the clubroom. I think that's the source of the stench.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah... I guess? It just popped into my mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold it! I smell something fishy here. You plotted this whole thing with the swim club, didn't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Then, after we are all done with our tasks, let's help the two out with the campfire preparations.
